title: Shiny Wolf
description: Added some craftable pet related items to make pets more shiny and powerful.
body:
# Shiny Wolf

## Introduction
A game mod for Minecraft Java Edition.
We have added some items related to synthesizable pets, making them shine brighter and stronger.   

## Versions, Mod Loaders, and Compatibility
- Minecraft version 1.21.8-1.21.11
- Can be used for Fabric server/client

## Items
- Agile Bones: Increases the speed of taming wolves. Bones + Sugar
- Golden Bone: Tames the Wolf, restores half of its health, and causes it to emit light continuously. Bone + Gold Grain
- Bone of Love: After consuming, it immediately restores the creature to a fertile state. Bone + Sweet Berry
- Name the bone. After naming it on the anvil, name the wolf. Bone + Paper
- Obedient Bone: When used on a wild wolf, it can instantly tame the wolf and restore its full health. Bone + raw lamb meat
- Strength Bone: Temporarily boosts the attack and defense of tamed wolves (increases strength and resistance). Bone + Cooked Mutton
The synthetic pattern of all bones is cruciform
B represents the bone, and # denotes the material.
```
pattern: [
  " # ",
  "#B#",
  " # "
]
```
------
# 闪亮狼狼

## 介绍
一个Minecraft Java版游戏模组。
添加了一些可合成宠物相关物品，让宠物变得更闪亮强大。  

## 版本、模组加载器与兼容性
- Minecraft版本 1.21.8-1.21.11
- 可用于Fabric服务端/客户端

## 物品
- 敏捷骨头 提升驯服狼的速度 骨头+糖
- 黄金骨头 驯服狼恢复一半血量，并持续发光。 骨头+金粒
- 爱之骨头 服用后立即恢复为可繁殖状态 骨头+甜浆果
- 命名骨头 在铁砧上命名后给狼起名 骨头+纸
- 听话骨头 对野生狼使用可立即驯服，恢复狼的全部生命值。 骨头+生羊肉
- 力量骨头 短暂提升驯服狼的攻击和防御（力量+抗性提升） 骨头+熟羊肉
所有骨头的合成模式均为十字形
B是骨头，#是材料。
```
pattern: [
  " # ",
  "#B#",
  " # "
]
```
